# Test Case: build-and-deploy

## Simulated User Request

"Package my Even Hub app for submission. My app is in the quickstart output directory at harness/.output/quickstart/demo-glasses/"

## Context

- The user has a completed Even Hub project at the path above (generated by the quickstart skill)
- `app.json` and `src/main.ts` are present in that directory
- The user wants to produce a distributable `.ehpk` package file
- No prior build artifacts exist yet

## Output Directory

The implementer operates inside the existing project at:
`harness/.output/quickstart/demo-glasses/`

The packaged artifact will be written to `dist/` within that project.

## Expected Behavior

The skill should guide the agent to:
1. Validate `app.json` — check all required fields are present and correct
2. Run `npm run build` to produce the `dist/` bundle via Vite
3. Run `npx evenhub pack app.json dist` to create the `.ehpk` archive
4. Confirm the `.ehpk` file exists in the current directory
5. Surface any troubleshooting guidance if a step fails (e.g. missing fields, build errors)
